seo.title: Careers | HeartLink
seo.description: Work that needs trust. HeartLink looks for people with judgment, discretion and respect for private-client confidentiality.

hero.title: Work that needs trust.
hero.description: We look for people with maturity, good judgment, strong communication and complete respect for client privacy.

roles.title: Senior Relationship Manager
roles.details: Mumbai · Hybrid · 8+ years in private client, luxury or advisory services

roles.title: Network Scout
roles.details: Global · Flexible · Strong social intelligence and trusted networks

roles.title: Relationship Advisor
roles.details: India · Consulting · Couple or family guidance experience

roles.title: Private Office Associate
roles.details: Mumbai · Full-time · High-touch operations and strict confidentiality

rolesIntro.title: The right person matters more than an open role.
rolesIntro.description: HeartLink is a small, deliberately selective team. These are the kinds of roles we consider when the right person appears, not a running list of urgent vacancies.

culture.title: Small by design. Exacting by nature.
culture.description: We work without scripts, quotas or superficial signals of success. The standard is a thoughtful process, a protected client and advice we would stand behind in the lives of our own families.

cards.title: Discretion is a discipline.
cards.description: Privacy is practised in every message, meeting, note and introduction.

cards.title: Judgment over velocity.
cards.description: We reward depth of thought, not the speed of moving a profile through a system.

cards.title: Warm but honest.
cards.description: Clients should feel respected, protected and clearly guided.

closing.quote: Exceptional people do not always arrive through open roles.
